data.title: Pan Global awarded mineral rights block next to Escacena Project in Spain, expanding it by 74% to over 10,000 hectares. Drilling ongoing at La Romana and Bravo Targets. Stock: TSXV: PGZ | OTCQB: PGZFF | FRA: 2EU.
data.description: PGZ, listed on TSXV and OTCQB as PGZFF, as well as FRA as 2EU, has significantly increased its Escacena Project to over 10,000 hectares, marking a 74% expansion. The new mineral rights acquired are predominantly unexplored and boast several untested geophysical targets, particularly for VMS style copper mineralization. The company persists with its drilling activities at the La Romana and Bravo Targets within the Escacena Project, aiming to explore the potential of these areas further.

data.title: Schaumburg debuts first electric paratransit fleet with Polara for charging infrastructure on Oct 1.
data.description: Yesterday in Schaumburg, Illinois, the community celebrated the introduction of new electric paratransit buses on October 1st. The buses were launched in collaboration with Polara. This partnership facilitated the design and implementation of the charging infrastructure for these environmentally friendly vehicles.
META INTRODUCES COMMUNITIES ON THREADS

data.title: Nvidia value hits $4.6T, Bitcoin aims $120,000. Wall Street subdued amid gov shutdown. NVDA stock rises, S&P 500 dips 0.1% to 6,700. Nasdaq 100 up 0.2% to 24,848. NVIDIA market cap at record high, $4.6T. Semiconductors shine with ETF climbing 2%.
data.description: Amid the second day of the U.S. government shutdown, Wall Street appears relatively calm, with indexes showing minor declines midday after hitting new record highs at the opening bell. NVDA stock has surged to notable price levels. The S&P 500 hovered around 6,700 by 12 p.m. ET, marking a 0.1% drop, while the Nasdaq 100 saw a 0.2% increase to 24,848, largely influenced by its heavy focus on artificial intelligence stocks. The tech-heavy index is on track for a fifth consecutive day of gains, hitting fresh all-time highs. The Russell 2000 and Dow Jones remained steady. NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) saw over a 1% rise, boosting its market cap to a record $4.6 trillion, stretching its winning streak to a sixth successive day. Semiconductors excelled, with the iShares Semiconductor ETF (NYSE: SOXX) climbing approximately 2% to reach new record peaks. More details available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: JBM lists 14Fifty NeoCity apartments in Orlando with 292 units on 14.07 acres.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on October 2, 2025, JBM® Institutional Multifamily Advisors announced the exclusive listing of 14Fifty NeoCity - a premium Class A mid-rise multifamily complex in the sought-after Orlando MSA. Constructed in 2021, this property comprises 292 units situated on approximately 14.07 acres of land. The community boasts an array of amenities and modern features for residents.

data.title: Camden National Corp (NASDAQ: CAC) to report Q3 financial results on Oct. 28, 2025, with conference call at 3:00 p.m. Eastern.
data.description: A company headquartered in Camden, Maine, known as Camden National Corporation (NASDAQ: CAC), is set to disclose its financial and operational performance for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2025. This announcement is scheduled to take place on Tuesday, October 28, 2025. Interested parties can participate in a conference call and webcast session at 3:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to gain insights on the reported results.

data.title: Rivian stock tumbles as EV maker cuts full-year delivery forecast, impacting investors.
data.description: Rivian's stock experienced a sharp decline on Thursday following the company's announcement of September delivery numbers and a revised full-year delivery forecast. This news resulted in a significant drop in their stock value.

data.title: Bitcoin reaches 2-month high near $120k; Crypto stock surges 150% as prices rally amid govt shutdown. Bakkt vaults to streamline.
data.description: The prices of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies are on the rise despite the government shutdown, with Bitcoin reaching a two-month high near $120,000. Bakkt is experiencing significant growth due to its efforts to transform and streamline operations. Additionally, a particular crypto stock has surged by 150%.

data.title: Buffett invested $9.7 billion in Berkshire Hathaway deal with OXY, enabling stock buybacks.
data.description: Warren Buffett has provided a cash infusion of $9.7 billion to OXY, enabling the company to offer him stock buybacks. This move allows Buffett to benefit from both sides of the deal, showcasing his shrewd investment strategy.

data.title: Tesla delivered a record 497,099 EVs in Q3 due to expiring tax credits, impacting stock.
data.description: In the third quarter, Tesla achieved a new record in deliveries, totaling 497,099 electric vehicles (EVs) as the soon-to-expire EV tax credits boosted demand in the United States. Consequently, Tesla's stock saw a slight decline following this news.

data.title: Fujifilm to showcase "One-Stop Solutions" at SEMICON West 2025 in Phoenix, Arizona from Oct 7-9, 2025. Focus on high-purity chemicals & semiconductor materials.
data.description: FUJIFILM Corporation's U.S.-based semiconductor materials subsidiary, FUJIFILM Electronic Materials U.S.A., Inc., is set to take part in “SEMICON West 2025”, a semiconductor manufacturing exhibition in Phoenix, Arizona, from October 7-9, 2025. At the event, the company plans to showcase its wide range of high-purity chemicals and semiconductor materials. They will participate as an exhibitor to promote their offerings to industry professionals and attendees.

data.title: Squarespace and Perplexity partner to transform business creation in AI era - announced in New York on Oct 2, 2025.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, a strategic partnership was announced between Squarespace, a platform supporting entrepreneurs in online brand and business building, and Perplexity. This collaboration aims to revolutionize business launch and growth in an AI-driven online environment. Key details of the partnership include significant enhancements to support businesses in leveraging artificial intelligence for online success.

data.title: GoSaaS, Inc. rebrands to GoSaaS.ai emphasizing AI-first strategy for Oracle Cloud customers, moving from GoSaaS.io.
data.description: In Irvine, California, an Oracle Cloud Applications implementation partner, GoSaaS, Inc., revealed its transition from GoSaaS.io to GoSaaS.ai and showcased a new logo. The modification signifies a fundamental shift – highlighting the shift to SaaS is now about leveraging AI for results, not just transitioning from older systems. The company explained that while their earlier brand focused on transitioning from on-premises to cloud seven years ago, the current emphasis is on the activities post-transition. The move to GoSaaS.ai underlines the importance of AI-driven outcomes in the present SaaS landscape.

data.title: Limited edition NBA collection by Billie Eilish x Mitchell & Ness launching Oct 7, 2025's sale in LA.
data.description: A special collaboration between Complex, Fanatics, and Mitchell & Ness is set to launch on October 7, 2025 in Los Angeles. The highly anticipated Billie Eilish x Mitchell & Ness NBA League Collection will combine music, style, and basketball seamlessly. This limited-edition drop will feature exclusive pieces that cater to fans of both the artist and the sport. The collection is expected to generate significant interest, highlighting the intersection of various cultural elements. Be prepared to grab your favorite items before they sell out.

data.title: Loffler Companies and Xerox partnership expands to cover sales and services in the Upper Midwest.
data.description: In St. Louis Park, Minnesota on October 2, 2025, Loffler Companies, a leading privately held provider of business technology and managed services in the United States, revealed a noteworthy growth in its collaboration with Xerox. This expansion marks a substantial development in the channel between the two companies, showcasing Xerox's and Loffler Companies' commitment to enhancing their partnership.

data.title: Zinzino AB is conducting three new issues with payment by set-off based on Annual General Meeting authorization.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on October 2, 2025, the company's Board of Directors made significant decisions following the Annual General Meeting on May 28, 2025. At a meeting held on August 28, 2025, they approved three new issues with payment by set-off, in line with the registered issue authorization. This move underscores the company's strategic approach to financial decisions and growth, marking a significant development in its operations.

data.title: Kihealth secures $5M in seed funding for new diabetes diagnostic test, set for commercial launch.
data.description: A precision diagnostics company, Kihealth Inc., located in St. Augustine, Florida, has successfully concluded its seed funding round with a total of $5 million raised. This amount exceeded the initial target, showcasing high investor interest in the company's innovative methods for detecting diseases early. Kihealth's focus on metabolic health and disease prevention has garnered significant support, leading to the development of a minimally-invasive test that analyzes biomarkers linked to beta cell apoptosis. The funding secured will aid in the commercial launch of this pioneering diagnostic tool.
